zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Butterworth於1472年出生在英國多瑟特布拉德福德 培維勒爾時，她的父親Henry Butterworth26歲，母親Margaret Ridge20歲。她於大約1493年與John de Peverell II在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年在英國藍卡爾洛達爾享年58歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾洛達爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Butterworth于1472年出生在英国多瑟特布拉德福德 培維勒爾时，她的父亲Henry Butterworth26岁，母亲Margaret Ridge20岁。她于大约1493年与John de Peverell II在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年在英国藍卡爾洛達爾享年58岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾洛達爾。

nameMeanings.name: Butterworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Butterworth in Lancashire (near Rochdale). Named with Old English butere ‘butter’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Butterworth was born in 1472, in Bradford Peverell, Dorset, England, her father, Henry Butterworth, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Ridge, was 20. She married John de Peverell II about 1493, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1530, in Rochdale, Lancashire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Rochdale, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Butterworth est née en 1472, à Bradford Peverell, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Henry Butterworth, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Ridge, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John de Peverell II environ 1493, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1530, à Rochdale, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Rochdale, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Butterworth 1472 in Bradford Peverell, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Butterworth 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret Ridge 20. Sie hat um 1493 in Devon, England, United Kingdom John de Peverell II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1530 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Rochdale, Lancashire, England und wurde in Rochdale, Lancashire, England begraben.

Lei sposato John de Peverell II circa 1493, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Butterworthが1472年にイギリスドールセトブラドフォード ペバーエルで生まれた時，父Henry Butterworthは26歳，母Margaret Ridgeは20歳であった。約1493年にイギリスイギリスデボンでJohn de Peverell IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年にイギリスランカシュアイアロチダルで58歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアロチダルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Butterworth(이)가 1472년 영국 도르세트 브래드퍼드 p에버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Butterworth(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Ridge(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 John de Peverell II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 영국 랭카실르 록h데일에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 록h데일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Butterworth nasceu em 1472, em Bradford Peverell, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Butterworth, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Ridge, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Peverell II aproximadamente 1493, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Butterworth родилась в 1472 г. в местности брадфорд пивирэлл, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Butterworth было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Ridge, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Peverell II около 1493 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1530 г. в местности рочдеил, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности рочдеил, ланкашир, Англия.
